hooks.command: output=$(dotnet build --no-restore 2>&1); rc=$?; [ $rc -ne 0 ] && { echo "Build failed after last changes:"; echo "$output" | grep -E " error " | head -15; exit 2; }

output=$(dotnet test tests/ArchitectureTests --no-restore 2>&1); rc=$?; [ $rc -ne 0 ] && { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"Architecture tests failed. Fix violations before committing: dotnet test tests/ArchitectureTests"}}'; exit 1; }
